$schema.description: Reference to the Configuration Template JSON schema this document follows.

name.description: Configuration template name. Shown in the configuration editor and used as the primary chooser label. Required.

id.description: Configuration template identifier. Matches the `configurationTemplate` referenced from element templates. Required.

kind.description: The class of configuration this template produces, e.g. "CREDENTIAL". Internal identifier, never shown to users. Required.

version.description: Version of the configuration template. Considered unique based on its id and version. Required.

description.description: Configuration template description. Shown in the configuration editor.

documentationRef.description: URL pointing to external documentation. Must be a valid http(s) URL.

keywords.description: List of keywords to help users discover the configuration template. Used in search and filtering, but not displayed in the UI.
